ead.archdesc:
======= RMM04405Philippines Army Headquarters bulletins4405Compiled by A.C. LipskyDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
December 20012B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
wwiiThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:49:43 UTC.ENG12/07/2018

converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Philippines Army Headquarters bulletins
Philippines. Army. Headquarters
4405
1.2 cubic feet. 1.2 cubic feet.
1936-1945. Bulletins. Bulletins issued by the Philippines Army Headquarters during World War II, including a set of statements issued by General Douglas MacArthur. Collection material in English 2088184
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
A.C. Lipsky
Date completed:
April 1989
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, December 2001
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Bulletins issued by the Philippines Army Headquarters during World War II, including a set of statements issued by General Douglas MacArthur.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters, Manila. Bulletins, 1936-1937
Box 1
Series II. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters. Bulletins, 1938-1941 . Incomplete
Box 1
Series III. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters, Manila. General Order Bulletins, 1938-1941
Box 1
Series IV. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters, Manila. Training Directives, 1937-1938
Box 1
Series V. Notes prepared for the instruction of Philippine Civil Affairs personnel, 1944-1945
Box 1
Series VI. Standing Operating Procedures, General Headquarters, Southwest Pacific Area, 1944-1945
Box 1
Series VII. Government of the Philippine Islands, Department of the Interior and Labor Headquarters. Philippine Constabulary, Manila, 1933
Box 2
Series VIII. Commonwealth of the Philippines, Army Headquarters, Manila. General Orders, 1936-1937 . Incomplete
Box 2
Cite As:
Philippines Army Headquarters Bulletins, #4405. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Philippines -- History -- 1898-1946. World War, 1939-1945 -- Philippines. MacArthur, Douglas, 1880-1964.
